zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Battaille of Fawdon於1215年出生在英國諾圖波藍德法頓時，她的父親William Battaille of Fawdon27歲，母親Constance de Flamville23歲。她於1243年之前與William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯享年77歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Battaille of Fawdon于1215年出生在英国諾圖波藍德法頓时，她的父亲William Battaille of Fawdon27岁，母亲Constance de Flamville23岁。她于1243年之前与William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯享年77岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Battaille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Brunel, Celine, Jacques.

French: nickname for a bellicose man, from bataille ‘battle’ (from Latin battualia), or a habitational name from (La) Bataille, the name of several places in France, all named as the site of a battle in former times.
West Indian (mainly Haiti): nickname from French bataille ‘battle’ (compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Battaille of Fawdon was born in 1215, in Fawdon, Northumberland, England, her father, William Battaille of Fawdon, was 27 and her mother, Constance de Flamville, was 23. She married William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas before 1243, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1292, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 77, and was buried in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Battaille of Fawdon est née en 1215, à Fawdon, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Battaille of Fawdon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Constance de Flamville, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas avant 1243, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1292, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Battaille of Fawdon 1215 in Fawdon, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Battaille of Fawdon 27 und ihre Mutter Constance de Flamville 23. Sie hat vor 1243 in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1292 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Battaille of Fawdon è nata il nel 1215 nel Fawdon, Northumberland, England, sua padre, William Battaille of Fawdon, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Constance de Flamville, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas prima del 1243, nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1292, nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Battaille of Fawdonが1215年にイギリスノースウンバーランドファウドンで生まれた時，父William Battaille of Fawdonは27歳，母Constance de Flamvilleは23歳であった。1243年以前にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスでWilliam "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで77歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Battaille of Fawdon(이)가 1215년 영국 노르스벌랜드 파던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Battaille of Fawdon(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance de Flamville(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1243년 이전 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에 묻혔다.

mn.Hermiston, Midlothian, Scotland: Hermiston, Edinburghshire, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Battaille of Fawdon nasceu em 1215, em Fawdon, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Battaille of Fawdon, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Flamville, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas antes 1243, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1292, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Battaille of Fawdon родилась в 1215 г. в местности фавдон, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William Battaille of Fawdon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Flamville, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas перед 1243 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1292 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance Battaille of Fawdon nació en 1215, en Fawdon, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Battaille of Fawdon, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Constance de Flamville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William "Longlegs" Douglas 3rd Lord of Douglas antes de 1243, en Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1292, en Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
